positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. Depict glowing bioluminescent mushrooms forming intricate pathways, intertwined with stylized constellations that bloom like flowers. The central focus is a gentle, stylized crescent moon resting on a bed of glowing moss, surrounded by swirling, ethereal cosmic dust. The aesthetic should be high-contrast, using a palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant teals, soft purples, and pops of glowing gold. Clean lines, strong silhouettes, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Composition must be balanced and central, maximizing negative space for clean print application. Intricate details should be scalable and legible.
negative: photorealistic, 3d rendering, bokeh, blur, grainy, artifacts, signature, text, watermark, logo, messy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, cartoonish, childish
